name: input-field-unit
title: BTInputFieldUnit
description: Split input combining a unit selector dropdown (left, dynamic width) with a floating-label text field (right). Each panel has an independent border that activates on interaction — left activates on dropdown open, right activates on field focus. Supports sanitizer (raw value), formatter (display-only), clearable button, hasSearch in unit dropdown, error, and disabled states.
